title: Poppy Playtime: Blueprint
description: The Ultimate Poppy Playtime mod for minecraft java!
body:
Welcome to Poppy Playtime Blueprint! The Ultimate poppy playtime mod for minecraft java!
This mod has been worked on for a WHILE.
What can you do with the mod?

-Build your own Playtime Co. Factory!!!
-Roleplay with your friends!
-And More!!

With over 100+ block and decor this sets the stage!

With blocks from All chapters!
And Grabpack items! (dont work :( )
AND monster blocks!!!

And here is also an explanation why some things in the update we just released are buggy or broken, see the mod was originally made for 1.20.1, but in the middle of developing we changed to 1.21.1 Neoforge, so the first version ill upload here is the latest version i found from my workspace file for 1.20.1. So if you send any bugs abt this version, or want anything to get added in the 1.20.1 version, im sorry but everyhting will now me completely redone and remade into 1.21.1. :)

THANK YOU SO MUCH FOR PLAYING!!!
i love u :3
